claim_boundary: Goal1497 wires Python runtime awareness of the reserved OptiX COLLECT_K_BOUNDED device-pointer symbol, but refuses execution until a measured native implementation exists. It does not run OptiX, does not prove true zero-copy, and does not authorize public speedup wording, whole-app claims, partner tensor handoff, stable primitive promotion, or release action.
runtime_refusal_message: rtdl_optix_collect_k_bounded_i64_device is reserved but not implemented; do not use it as Goal1493 device-buffer execution evidence
